channel.title: tree mortality on Sami W Rifai
channel.description: Recent content in tree mortality on Sami W Rifai

item.title: Amazon Wind Disturbance
item.description: Strong thunderstorms in the Amazon basin are capable of producing mass tree mortality events, but there impact of the long-term forest structure, carbon stocks, and species composition. During my PhD I examined which trees are most likely to die from a wind disturbance event, how the community composition changes in the decades following disturbance, and I quantified the spatial and temporal patterns of wind disturbance in the northwest Amazon.
